properties.description: Identifier for learning objects in the Cornerstone Learn system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be unique within the context of the learning objects
properties.business_description: This column represents the unique identifier for each learning object associated with employee training and compliance activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate format to ensure it meets VARCHAR standards
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userID, Filter by trainingStatus

properties.description: Identifier for users in the system, representing each learner's unique account.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be unique within the context of user records
properties.business_description: A unique identifier assigned to each user participating in training activities, used to track their learning performance and compliance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for duplicates in user records, Validate format to ensure it meets VARCHAR standards
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userID to analyze specific learner performance, Filter by trainingStatus to assess compliance

properties.description: Indicates whether the training activity has been completed by the learner.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Values must be 'true' or 'false'
properties.business_description: This column represents the completion status of a training activity for an employee. A value of 'true' indicates that the training has been completed, while 'false' indicates it has not.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid boolean values, Ensure no unexpected values are present
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by completion status, Filter by userID

properties.description: Indicates whether a training assignment is overdue based on the due date.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Values must be 'Yes' or 'No'
properties.business_description: This column represents whether a training assignment has passed its due date, which is critical for tracking compliance and learner performance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid values ('Yes', 'No'), Ensure no unexpected values are present
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by overdue status, Filter by userID

properties.description: Indicates whether a training module is assigned to a user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training is not assigned, Should reflect true/false values indicating assignment status
properties.business_description: This column represents the assignment status of a training module to a user, helping to track which users have been assigned specific training.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate that values are either 'true' or 'false', Check for null values where assignment is expected
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by assigned status, Filter by userID to see assignments per user
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of assigned trainings, COUNT of unassigned trainings

properties.description: Column representing the performance score of a learner in the training module.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training is not completed, Should be a numeric value representing performance
properties.business_description: This score indicates the level of achievement or performance of an employee in their learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate that the score is a numeric value, Check for any unexpected characters in the score
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userID, Filter by trainingStatus

properties.description: Indicates whether the learner successfully completed the training module.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training is not yet completed, Should reflect 'true' for successful completions and 'false' for failures
properties.business_description: This column represents the success status of a learner in completing a training module, which is crucial for assessing employee learning performance.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are either 'true' or 'false' or null, Check for consistency with the isCompleted column
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by success status to analyze completion rates, Filter by userID to assess individual performance
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of successful completions, PERCENTAGE of successful completions against total attempts

properties.description: Duration of time spent by the user on a specific learning activity, recorded in a VARCHAR format representing a numeric value.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user has not started the activity, Should be a valid numeric representation in string format
properties.business_description: This column captures the amount of time a user has spent on a learning activity, which is crucial for analyzing user engagement and performance in training programs.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate that the value can be converted to a numeric type, Check for excessively high values that may indicate data entry errors
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userID, Filter by isCompleted status

properties.description: Indicates whether the learner was satisfied with the training completed after the due date.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training was completed on time, Should reflect a binary satisfaction status (e.g., satisfied, not satisfied)
properties.business_description: This column captures the satisfaction level of learners who completed their training late, providing insights into learner experience and training effectiveness.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid satisfaction responses (e.g., 'Yes', 'No'), Ensure consistency with completion dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by trainingStatus, Filter by isOverdue
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of satisfiedLate responses, Percentage of satisfiedLate against total late completions

properties.description: Indicates the current status of the training for a user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no training is assigned, Must reflect valid statuses such as 'Assigned', 'In Progress', 'Completed', 'Overdue'
properties.business_description: This column represents whether a training module is currently assigned, completed, overdue, or in progress for a user.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are one of the predefined statuses, Check for null values only when no training is assigned
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userID, Filter by trainingStatus
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by status, GROUP BY userID and trainingStatus

properties.description: Date when the training or learning activity was cancelled.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training was not cancelled, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column represents the date on which a training session or learning activity was cancelled by the user or the system.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid date format, Ensure that cancellationDate is not later than completionDate
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific cancellation dates, Filter by userID to see cancellations per user
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of cancellations by date, COUNT of cancellations by userID

properties.description: The date when the user registered for the training or course.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the user has not registered for a training, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column captures the date of registration for each training session, which is essential for tracking user engagement and compliance with training requirements.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for future dates, Ensure consistency with other date fields
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by registration date range, Filter by userID
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by month, GROUP BY year

properties.description: The date when the learning attempt started, represented as a timestamp without time zone.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the attempt has not started, Should be in a valid date format
properties.business_description: This column indicates the start date of a learner's attempt to complete a training module.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific date ranges, Filter by userID to analyze individual attempts
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT attempts by date, GROUP BY date for daily reports

properties.description: The date when the training or learning activity was completed by the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training is not completed, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column represents the date on which a learner has completed a specific training module or activity, which is crucial for tracking compliance and performance in learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for logical consistency with other date fields (e.g., cannot be after dueDate)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by completion date range, Filter by userID to see individual completion dates
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of completed trainings, AVERAGE time to completion

properties.description: The date when the training or learning activity was assigned to the user.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training has not been assigned yet, Should be in a valid date format
properties.business_description: This column represents the date on which a specific training or learning activity was assigned to an employee, which is crucial for tracking compliance and performance in learning activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by assignedDate to analyze training assignments over time, Filter by userID to see assignments for specific employees
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of assignments by date, GROUP BY assignedDate for trend analysis

properties.description: The date by which a training or compliance activity must be completed.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training is not time-sensitive, Must be in a valid date format
properties.business_description: This column represents the deadline for learners to complete their assigned training or compliance activities.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for logical consistency with other date fields (e.g., registrationDate, completionDate)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by due date range, Filter by completion status
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of trainings due by date, SUM of overdue trainings

properties.description: The date when the training or compliance activity expires.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the training does not have an expiration date, Should be in a valid date format
properties.business_description: This column indicates the expiration date of a training or compliance activity, which is crucial for tracking learner performance and compliance requirements.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for future dates if applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by expiry date range, Filter by userID to see individual training expirations
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of expired trainings, COUNT of trainings expiring within a certain period

properties.description: This table contains detailed records of employee learning activities, including completion status, scores, and timestamps for various training events.
properties.business_purpose: The Transcript_csod table serves as a foundational data source for analyzing employee learning performance, enabling organizations to track training effectiveness and compliance.
properties.data_lineage: Data is sourced from the Cornerstone OnDemand (CSOD) learning management system, populated in real-time as users engage with training modules.
properties.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 5 years to comply with training and development regulations.
